syntax_25.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_25.title: Add/Remove Players from Group Scores
syntax_25.description:
Add or removed a players group based score. 

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).
syntax_25.syntax_pattern:
add %player% to group score [with id] %string%
(delete|remove) %player% from group [id based] score %string%

en:
Add or removed a players group based score. 

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_24.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_24.title: Add Player to ID Based Bossbar
syntax_24.description: Add a player to an ID based Bossbar.

en: Add a player to an ID based Bossbar.

syntax_26.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_26.title: Add/Set Bossbar Flag
syntax_26.description: Add a flag to a ID based Bossbar.

en: Add a flag to a ID based Bossbar.
Creates an EffectLib atom effect.
Creates an EffectLib bleed effect.

syntax_31.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_31.title: Change Citizen Skin
syntax_31.description:
Change the skin of a citizen by:
* ID
* Minecraft Username

This will change the skin of an NPC to a given Minecraft username

en:
Change the skin of a citizen by:
* ID
* Minecraft Username

This will change the skin of an NPC to a given Minecraft username

syntax_34.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_34.title: Citizen Hold
syntax_34.description: This will make a Citizen hold an object in their hand.

en: This will make a Citizen hold an object in their hand.

syntax_35.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_35.title: Citizen Invulnerability
syntax_35.description:
Change if a citizen takes damage by:
* ID
* Invulnerable
* Vulnerable

This will allow you to choose if an NPC can receive damage

en:
Change if a citizen takes damage by:
* ID
* Invulnerable
* Vulnerable

This will allow you to choose if an NPC can receive damage

syntax_36.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_36.title: Citizen Look Targeting
syntax_36.description:
Change the view of a citizen by:
* ID
* Location

Pick a location for an NPC to look at

en:
Change the view of a citizen by:
* ID
* Location

Pick a location for an NPC to look at

syntax_37.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_37.title: Citizen Max Health
syntax_37.description:
Modify citizens max health by:
* ID
* Number

Will allow you to modify the maximum amount of health an NPC can have. 0.5 = half a heart, 1 = a heart, etc...

en:
Modify citizens max health by:
* ID
* Number

Will allow you to modify the maximum amount of health an NPC can have. 0.5 = half a heart, 1 = a heart, etc...

syntax_38.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_38.title: Citizen Nametag Visibility
syntax_38.description:
Modify citizen nametags by:
* ID
* Invisibility
* Visibility

For if you want to toggle the visibility of names above the NPC's head

en:
Modify citizen nametags by:
* ID
* Invisibility
* Visibility

For if you want to toggle the visibility of names above the NPC's head

syntax_39.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_39.title: Citizens Look Close Trait
syntax_39.description: Allow citizens to look at the closest player automatically. This effect is toggleable, so to disable this trait for a citizen run this effect again.
syntax_39.syntax_pattern: give npc %number% the look close trait

en: Allow citizens to look at the closest player automatically. This effect is toggleable, so to disable this trait for a citizen run this effect again.

syntax_40.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_40.title: Create Citizen
syntax_40.description:
Create citizens with:
* Name
* Direction
* Location
* Entity Type

This will place an NPC in your world that can be modified

en:
Create citizens with:
* Name
* Direction
* Location
* Entity Type

This will place an NPC in your world that can be modified

syntax_27.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_27.title: Animated Ball Effect
syntax_27.description: Creates an EffectLib animated ball effect.
syntax_27.syntax_pattern: (spawn|create|apply) (a|the|an) animated ball (effect|formation) (at|on|for|to) %entity/location% with id %string% [with particle %particles%] [offset by %number%, %number%(,| and) %number%]

en: Creates an EffectLib animated ball effect.

syntax_44.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_44.title: Create ID based Bossbar
syntax_44.description: Create a ID based Bossbar for a group of people.
syntax_44.syntax_pattern: create (bossbar|boss bar) title[d] %string% and id %string% for %players% [with (value|progress) %number%] [with colors %BossBarColor%] [with style %BossBarStyle%] [with flags %BossBarFlag%]

en: Create a ID based Bossbar for a group of people.

syntax_47.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_47.title: Delete Boss Bar
syntax_47.description: Delete the boss bar of a player

en: Delete the boss bar of a player

syntax_29.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_29.title: Bind Hologram
syntax_29.description:
Bind Hologram by:
* Entity
* Timespan
* Offset x, y & z

Create floating text that follows an entity
syntax_29.syntax_pattern: bind hologram %string% to %living entities% for %timespan% [offset by %number%, %number%( and|,) %number%]

en:
Bind Hologram by:
* Entity
* Timespan
* Offset x, y & z

Create floating text that follows an entity

syntax_49.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_49.title: Delete hologram line
syntax_49.description: Delete a single line in a object based hologram.

en: Delete a single line in a object based hologram.

syntax_41.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_41.title: Create Dynamic Object Based Holograms
syntax_41.description: Create dynamic holograms that can be bound to entity's through an id based system.
syntax_41.syntax_pattern: create bound holo object %string% with id %string% to %entity% [offset by %number%, %number%( and|,) %number%]

en: Create dynamic holograms that can be bound to entity's through an id based system.
Delete/destroy an ID based Bossbar.

syntax_54.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_54.title: Delete/Stop Effect
syntax_54.description: Stop's a EffectLib effect that matches the id value.

en: Stop's a EffectLib effect that matches the id value.

syntax_55.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_55.title: Despawn Citizen
syntax_55.description:
Despawn citizens by:
* ID

Unlike delete a citizen this will just kill the NPC you can respawn it back at the created location with the respawn citizen effect

en:
Despawn citizens by:
* ID

Unlike delete a citizen this will just kill the NPC you can respawn it back at the created location with the respawn citizen effect

syntax_69.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_69.title: Players Tab Name
syntax_69.description:
Lets you customize a players name within the tab menu.

Please note the ['s] was added as of 1.9.18.

en:
Lets you customize a players name within the tab menu.

Please note the ['s] was added as of 1.9.18.

syntax_58.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_58.title: Equip Citizen
syntax_58.description:
Give citizens:
* Tools
* Armo(u)r

Give citizens things to hold in their hands and wear

en:
Give citizens:
* Tools
* Armo(u)r

Give citizens things to hold in their hands and wear

syntax_59.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_59.title: Fake Lightning (No Sound)
syntax_59.description: Creates a silent fake lightning strike at a location.

en: Creates a silent fake lightning strike at a location.
Hide a ID based Bossbar.

syntax_62.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_62.title: Make Citizen Attack
syntax_62.description:
Make citizens attack with:
* ID
* Mobs
* Players

Makes a citizen attack a living entity. The entity must be close enough to the NPC

en:
Make citizens attack with:
* ID
* Mobs
* Players

Makes a citizen attack a living entity. The entity must be close enough to the NPC

syntax_63.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_63.title: Make Citizen Talk
syntax_63.description:
Make citizens communicate with:
* ID
* Messages
* Players

This will make an NPC speak to a player with a custom message

en:
Make citizens communicate with:
* ID
* Messages
* Players

This will make an NPC speak to a player with a custom message

syntax_64.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_64.title: Max Health
syntax_64.description:
Set max health by:
* Entity
* Value

This will change the maximum health of an entity
syntax_64.syntax_pattern: set rf max[imum] h(ealth|p) of %entity% to %number%

en:
Set max health by:
* Entity
* Value

This will change the maximum health of an entity

syntax_65.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_65.title: Move Citizen
syntax_65.description:
Move citizens by:
* ID
* Location
* Speed

This will make a given NPC pathfind to a location

en:
Move citizens by:
* ID
* Location
* Speed

This will make a given NPC pathfind to a location

syntax_66.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_66.title: Place CrackShot Mine
syntax_66.description: Set a CrackShot mine at a location for a player. The string is the weapons name that will be responsible for the damage.

en: Set a CrackShot mine at a location for a player. The string is the weapons name that will be responsible for the damage.

syntax_67.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_67.title: Play Resource Pack Sound
syntax_67.description: Play a sound from a resource pack.

en: Play a sound from a resource pack.

syntax_68.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_68.title: Play Sound
syntax_68.description:
Play sound by:
* Player
* Client
* Volume

This will play a sound to a player and nobody else

If you want a list of skRayFall sounds go https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/spigot/ click ctrl + f and type 'sound' then press the down arrow once and then click the sound that is shown in green text and that will list all the sounds for you

en:
Play sound by:
* Player
* Client
* Volume

This will play a sound to a player and nobody else

If you want a list of skRayFall sounds go https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/spigot/ click ctrl + f and type 'sound' then press the down arrow once and then click the sound that is shown in green text and that will list all the sounds for you

syntax_70.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_70.title: Protect Player
syntax_70.description:
Protect by:
* Player
* Citizen ID

This will have a citizen follow a specified player and protect them

en:
Protect by:
* Player
* Citizen ID

This will have a citizen follow a specified player and protect them

syntax_71.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_71.title: Remove Citizen
syntax_71.description:
Remove citizens by:
* ID

This will permanently remove a citizen

en:
Remove citizens by:
* ID

This will permanently remove a citizen

syntax_72.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_72.title: Remove Player from BossBar
syntax_72.description: Remove a player from a ID based Bossbar.

en: Remove a player from a ID based Bossbar.

syntax_73.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_73.title: Remove/Delete Bossbar Flag
syntax_73.description: Remove a flag from a ID based Bossbar.

en: Remove a flag from a ID based Bossbar.

syntax_74.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_74.title: Respawn Citizen
syntax_74.description:
Respawn citizens by:
* ID
* Direction
* Location

This will force an NPC to come back to life if it was previously killed or despawned by the despawn citizen effect. This will not work if the citizen is already alive so it can't be used to duplicate citizens

en:
Respawn citizens by:
* ID
* Direction
* Location

This will force an NPC to come back to life if it was previously killed or despawned by the despawn citizen effect. This will not work if the citizen is already alive so it can't be used to duplicate citizens

syntax_75.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_75.title: Send Title
syntax_75.description:
Set title by:
* Name
* Subtitle
* Player
* Time
* Fadein
* Fadeout

This will send a title to a player with an optional subtitle and display time
syntax_75.syntax_pattern: send %player% title %string% [with subtitle %string%] [for %timespan%] [with %timespan% fade in and %timespan% fade out]

en:
Set title by:
* Name
* Subtitle
* Player
* Time
* Fadein
* Fadeout

This will send a title to a player with an optional subtitle and display time

syntax_76.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_76.title: Set Action Bar
syntax_76.description:
Display Action Bar by:
* Player
* Text

This will display text above the player's hotbar for a few seconds. This is like the text you receive when changing the item in your hand
syntax_76.syntax_pattern:
set action bar of %player% to %string%
set %player%['s] action bar to %string%

en:
Display Action Bar by:
* Player
* Text

This will display text above the player's hotbar for a few seconds. This is like the text you receive when changing the item in your hand

syntax_77.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_77.title: Set Below Name Score
syntax_77.description:
Set score of a sidebar by:
* Name
* Value
* Player
* Target

This will change the name and score below a player's name

en:
Set score of a sidebar by:
* Name
* Value
* Player
* Target

This will change the name and score below a player's name

syntax_78.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_78.title: Set Boss Bar
syntax_78.description: Set a timed or static bossbar.
syntax_78.syntax_pattern:
set bossbar named %string% for %player% to %number%
display bossbar with %string% to %player% for %timespan%

en: Set a timed or static bossbar.

syntax_79.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_79.title: Set Bossbar Color
syntax_79.description: Set the color of an ID based Bossbar.

en: Set the color of an ID based Bossbar.

syntax_80.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_80.title: Set Bossbar Progress/Value
syntax_80.description: Set the progress of an ID based bossbar.

en: Set the progress of an ID based bossbar.

syntax_51.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_51.title: Delete ID based score
syntax_51.description:
Delete an ID based score from a scoreboard.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

en:
Delete an ID based score from a scoreboard.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_81.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_81.title: Set Bossbar Style
syntax_81.description: Set the style of an ID based Bossbar.

en: Set the style of an ID based Bossbar.

syntax_52.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_52.title: Delete Object Based Holograms
syntax_52.description: Delete object based holograms by id.

en: Delete object based holograms by id.

syntax_82.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_82.title: Set Bossbar Title/Name
syntax_82.description: Set the name of an ID based Bossbar.

en: Set the name of an ID based Bossbar.

syntax_83.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_83.title: Set Cape
syntax_83.description: Give the player a cape. The Item stack in this effect MUST be a banner.

en: Give the player a cape. The Item stack in this effect MUST be a banner.

syntax_91.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_91.title: Text Effect
syntax_91.syntax_pattern: (spawn|create|apply) (a|the|an) text (effect|formation) with text %string% as %particles% (at|on|for|to) %entity/location% with id %string%[(,| and) %number% large]

en: Creates an EffectLib text effect.

syntax_87.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_87.title: Set Tab Header & Footer
syntax_87.description:
Modify Tab by:
* Header
* Footer
* Player

This will display a client side header and footer for a player
syntax_87.syntax_pattern: set tab header to %string% and footer to %string% for %player%

en:
Modify Tab by:
* Header
* Footer
* Player

This will display a client side header and footer for a player

syntax_88.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_88.title: Set Tablist Score
syntax_88.description:
Set the tablist score by:
* Scoreboard
* Value
* Player
* Target

This will change the score for a player in the tablist
syntax_88.syntax_pattern: set tab[list] score of %player% to %number% for %player%

en:
Set the tablist score by:
* Scoreboard
* Value
* Player
* Target

This will change the score for a player in the tablist

syntax_89.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_89.title: Show Particle
syntax_89.description:
Show particle by:
* Player
* Location
* Amount
* Particle Type

This will display a particle at a given location for a player. This is client side!

[List of particles ](https://gist.github.com/eyesniper2/935315532ef05fc56656)
syntax_89.syntax_pattern: show [%number%] %string% particle[s] at %location% for %player% [offset by x, y (and|,) z]

en:
Show particle by:
* Player
* Location
* Amount
* Particle Type

This will display a particle at a given location for a player. This is client side!

[List of particles ](https://gist.github.com/eyesniper2/935315532ef05fc56656)

syntax_90.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_90.title: Show/Unhide Bossbar
syntax_90.description: Show a hidden ID based Bossbar.

en: Show a hidden ID based Bossbar.

syntax_94.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_94.title: Unglow/Stop Glowing
syntax_94.description: Remove the glowing effect from the player.

en: Remove the glowing effect from the player.

syntax_97.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_97.title: Wipe Below Name
syntax_97.description:
Wipe score below player by:
* Scoreboard
* Player

This will wipe the score below the player

en:
Wipe score below player by:
* Scoreboard
* Player

This will wipe the score below the player

syntax_99.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_99.title: Wipe Tablist Score
syntax_99.description:
Wipe tablist score by:
* Scoreboard
* Player

This will remove the score from a player in the tablist

en:
Wipe tablist score by:
* Scoreboard
* Player

This will remove the score from a player in the tablist

syntax_101.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_101.title: On Crackshot Damage
syntax_101.description: Called when a weapon hits an entity. The player is the shooter, the event-entity is the victim and the event-string is the weapons name.

en: Called when a weapon hits an entity. The player is the shooter, the event-entity is the victim and the event-string is the weapons name.

syntax_102.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_102.title: On CrackShot Finish Reload
syntax_102.description: This event is triggered once a player has finished reloading. Event-string will return name of the player’s weapon.

en: This event is triggered once a player has finished reloading. Event-string will return name of the player’s weapon.

syntax_103.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_103.title: On CrackShot Reload
syntax_103.description: This event is triggered when a player starts to reload. Event-string will return name of the players weapon. Event-number will return the reload duration.

en: This event is triggered when a player starts to reload. Event-string will return name of the players weapon. Event-number will return the reload duration.

syntax_104.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_104.title: On CrackShot Scope/Unscope
syntax_104.description: An event for when player scopes or unscopes out of a weapon. Event-string will return name of the player’s weapon.

en: An event for when player scopes or unscopes out of a weapon. Event-string will return name of the player’s weapon.

syntax_105.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_105.title: On CrackShot Shoot
syntax_105.description: Called when a weapon is shot. The player is the shooter, event-entity is the projectile and event-string is the weapons name.

en: Called when a weapon is shot. The player is the shooter, event-entity is the projectile and event-string is the weapons name.

syntax_92.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_92.title: Top left building schematic
syntax_92.description:
Check schematic by:
* Location
* Citizen
* Top left

This will return the top left of the last built schematic
syntax_92.syntax_pattern: for builder %number% get the location of the top left of schematic centered at %location%

en:
Check schematic by:
* Location
* Citizen
* Top left

This will return the top left of the last built schematic

syntax_98.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_98.title: Wipe Sidebar
syntax_98.description:
Delete a sidebar by:
* Scoreboard
* Player

This will completely wipe a specified player's sidebar deleting all scores and the name of the sidebar.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

en:
Delete a sidebar by:
* Scoreboard
* Player

This will completely wipe a specified player's sidebar deleting all scores and the name of the sidebar.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_84.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_84.title: Set ID based Score
syntax_84.description:
Make an ID based score in a players scoreboard. This method is ideal for creating complex text based scoreboards.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).
syntax_84.syntax_pattern: (set|create) id [based] score %string% in sidebar of %player% to %number% with id %string%

en:
Make an ID based score in a players scoreboard. This method is ideal for creating complex text based scoreboards.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_95.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_95.title: Update Group Score
syntax_95.description:
Updates a group based score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

en:
Updates a group based score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_107.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_107.title: On Hologram Pickup
syntax_107.description: Called when a player “picks up” an item from an interactive hologram. This can only be done with Items in the holograms, not text. Event-string will give you the holograms id name and Event-Number will give you the specific line interacted with.

en: Called when a player “picks up” an item from an interactive hologram. This can only be done with Items in the holograms, not text. Event-string will give you the holograms id name and Event-Number will give you the specific line interacted with.

syntax_108.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_108.title: On Hologram Touch/Click
syntax_108.description: Called when a player right clicks a line from an interactive hologram. Event-string will give you the holograms id name and Event-Number will give you the specific line interacted with.

en: Called when a player right clicks a line from an interactive hologram. Event-string will give you the holograms id name and Event-Number will give you the specific line interacted with.

syntax_109.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_109.title: On Store
syntax_109.description: Called when a player places an item into a chest or ender chest. Event-item will give you the items that were moved into the chest. Event-inventory will give you the inventory. This event is also cancelable.

en: Called when a player places an item into a chest or ender chest. Event-item will give you the items that were moved into the chest. Event-inventory will give you the inventory. This event is also cancelable.

syntax_110.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_110.title: On Unstore
syntax_110.description: This event will be called when a player removes an item from a chest or ender chest. Event-item will give you the items that were moved out of the chest. Event-inventory will give you the inventory. This event is also cancelable.

en: This event will be called when a player removes an item from a chest or ender chest. Event-item will give you the items that were moved out of the chest. Event-inventory will give you the inventory. This event is also cancelable.

syntax_111.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_111.title: On Vote
syntax_111.description:
Check server vote by:
* Player
* Website

This will be called when someone votes for the server. Use event-string to return the name of the website they voted on

en:
Check server vote by:
* Player
* Website

This will be called when someone votes for the server. Use event-string to return the name of the website they voted on

syntax_113.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_113.title: Citizen is named
syntax_113.description:
Check citizen by:
* Name

A conditional check using citizens names over id numbers

en:
Check citizen by:
* Name

A conditional check using citizens names over id numbers

syntax_114.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_114.title: Is Natural/Unnatural
syntax_114.description: Using Core Protect, check to see if a block is natural or if it has been modified.

en: Using Core Protect, check to see if a block is natural or if it has been modified.
Get a players armor value.

syntax_118.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_118.title: Boss Bar Value
syntax_118.description: Gets the value of a bossbar (0-100).

en: Gets the value of a bossbar (0-100).

syntax_120.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_120.title: Citizen ID
syntax_120.description: Get the id number of a citizen from an entity.

en: Get the id number of a citizen from an entity.

syntax_121.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_121.title: Citizen Owner
syntax_121.description: Gets the owner of a citizen

en: Gets the owner of a citizen

syntax_122.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_122.title: CrackShot Weapon
syntax_122.description: This expression represents weapon interactions with crackshot. The text is the weapons name.

en: This expression represents weapon interactions with crackshot. The text is the weapons name.

syntax_124.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_124.title: Glowing
syntax_124.description: Get a players glowing status (True or False).

en: Get a players glowing status (True or False).

syntax_126.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_126.title: Hologram Line
syntax_126.description: Get the text in the line of a holo object

en: Get the text in the line of a holo object

syntax_127.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_127.title: Info of Enchantment
syntax_127.description: Get the presentable info of a specific enchantment number of an item.

en: Get the presentable info of a specific enchantment number of an item.

syntax_128.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_128.title: Last Created Citizen ID
syntax_128.description:
Checks for:
* The last created citizen

You can use this to check the ID of the last created citizen good for if you want to check the unique ID of a citizen you just created

en:
Checks for:
* The last created citizen

You can use this to check the ID of the last created citizen good for if you want to check the unique ID of a citizen you just created

syntax_129.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_129.title: Make Player Glow
syntax_129.description: Make a player glow. This is based on team color, will be white by default.

en: Make a player glow. This is based on team color, will be white by default.

syntax_130.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_130.title: Name of Citizen
syntax_130.description:
Used for:
* Checking citizen names
* Changing citizen names

This will allow you to check and set an NPC's name

en:
Used for:
* Checking citizen names
* Changing citizen names

This will allow you to check and set an NPC's name

syntax_132.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_132.title: No NBT
syntax_132.description:
Removes all NBT tags by:
* Item Stack

Using this expression will remove all vanilla minecraft lore from an item. For example a diamond sword would not show the vanilla +7 damage in the lore anymore

en:
Removes all NBT tags by:
* Item Stack

Using this expression will remove all vanilla minecraft lore from an item. For example a diamond sword would not show the vanilla +7 damage in the lore anymore

syntax_133.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_133.title: Number of Enchantments
syntax_133.description: Get the number of enchantments on an item.

en: Get the number of enchantments on an item.

syntax_134.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_134.title: Shiny Item
syntax_134.description:
Show Items by:
* Glow

Makes an item glow as an enchanted item but without the lore

en:
Show Items by:
* Glow

Makes an item glow as an enchanted item but without the lore

syntax_136.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_136.title: Title/Name of BossBar
syntax_136.description: Get the name of an ID based Bossbar.

en: Get the name of an ID based Bossbar.

syntax_137.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_137.title: Value/Progress of Bossbar
syntax_137.description: Get the value of an ID based Bossbar.

en: Get the value of an ID based Bossbar.

syntax_138.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_138.title: Bossbar Color
syntax_138.description: A data type to call the colors for the new 1.9 bossbars.
syntax_138.type_usage: blue, green, pink, purple, red, white or yellow

en: A data type to call the colors for the new 1.9 bossbars.

syntax_139.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_139.title: Bossbar Flag
syntax_139.description: Bar Flags to support the new 1.9 bossbars.
syntax_139.type_usage: create fog, darken sky or play boss music

en: Bar Flags to support the new 1.9 bossbars.

syntax_140.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_140.title: Bossbar Style
syntax_140.description: Bossbar styles to support the new 1.9 BossBar.
syntax_140.type_usage: segmented 10, segmented 12, segmented 20, segmented 6 and solid

en: Bossbar styles to support the new 1.9 BossBar.

syntax_116.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_116.title: Absolute Amount of Items
syntax_116.description: Get the number of items in a player’s inventory that are an absolute match to a sample item. To match they must have the same enchants, name and lore.

en: Get the number of items in a player’s inventory that are an absolute match to a sample item. To match they must have the same enchants, name and lore.

syntax_135.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_135.title: Single ID Score Value
syntax_135.description:
These expressions will get either the name or value of a ID based score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

en:
These expressions will get either the name or value of a ID based score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_112.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_112.title: Citizen is
syntax_112.description: Checks if a citizen has a certain ID.

en: Checks if a citizen has a certain ID.
Empty

syntax_57.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_57.title: Edit Object Based Holograms
syntax_57.description: Edit object based holograms. The first string is the id of the hologram to be changed and the second string is the new content of the hologram. By default the interactivity is false.
syntax_57.syntax_pattern:
edit holo object %string% to %string%  [and set interactivity to %boolean%]
edit holo object %string% [with] line [number] %number% to %string% [and set interactivity to %boolean%]

en: Edit object based holograms. The first string is the id of the hologram to be changed and the second string is the new content of the hologram. By default the interactivity is false.

syntax_46.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_46.title: Create Static Object Based Holograms
syntax_46.description:
Create non moving object based holograms! Use the interactive versions if you want to take advantage of the touch and pickup events!

Client side holograms are also possible with the second syntax but will also require protocollib.
syntax_46.syntax_pattern:
create holo object %string% with id  %string% at %location%
create client side holo object %string% with id %string% at %location% to %player%
create interactive holo object %string% with id %string% at %location%
create interactive client side holo object %string% with id %string% at %location% to %player%

en:
Create non moving object based holograms! Use the interactive versions if you want to take advantage of the touch and pickup events!

Client side holograms are also possible with the second syntax but will also require protocollib.

syntax_43.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_43.title: Create Hologram
syntax_43.description:
[NOTE] Client-side holograms require ProtocolLib

Set hologram by:
* Text
* Lines
* Floating Item
* Timespan
* Location
* Clientside

Create floating text at a location
syntax_43.syntax_pattern:
create hologram %string% at %location% for %timespan%
display hologram %string% at %location% to %player% for %timespan%

en:
[NOTE] Client-side holograms require ProtocolLib

Set hologram by:
* Text
* Lines
* Floating Item
* Timespan
* Location
* Clientside

Create floating text at a location

syntax_100.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_100.title: On Citizen Clicking
syntax_100.description:
Called when citizen is:
* Left clicked
* Right clicked

This will be called when a player clicks on an NPC. Using event-number will return the ID of the citizen that is clicked

en:
Called when citizen is:
* Left clicked
* Right clicked

This will be called when a player clicks on an NPC. Using event-number will return the ID of the citizen that is clicked

syntax_119.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_119.title: Bottom right building schematic
syntax_119.description:
Check schematic by:
* Location
* Citizen
* Bottom right

This will return the bottom right of the last built schematic
syntax_119.syntax_pattern: for builder %number% get the location of the bottom right of schematic centered at %location%

en:
Check schematic by:
* Location
* Citizen
* Bottom right

This will return the bottom right of the last built schematic

syntax_33.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_33.title: Citizen Build
syntax_33.description:
Build by:
* Schematic
* Player
* Location
* Citizen ID

This will have an NPC build a schematic that is located in plugins/Builder/schematics

en:
Build by:
* Schematic
* Player
* Location
* Citizen ID

This will have an NPC build a schematic that is located in plugins/Builder/schematics

syntax_115.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_115.title: Sidebar Is Set
syntax_115.description:
Check if sidebar:
* Is set
* For player

This will check if a sidebar is being displayed to a player.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

en:
Check if sidebar:
* Is set
* For player

This will check if a sidebar is being displayed to a player.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_131.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_131.title: Name/Title of Sidebar
syntax_131.description:
Get the name/title of a players side bar.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

en:
Get the name/title of a players side bar.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_85.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_85.title: Set Sidebar Name
syntax_85.description:
Change the sidebar name by:
* Scoreboard
* Name
* Players

This will change the name of a player's sidebar. The sidebar of the player must have at least one score in order for it to show on the sidebar.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).
syntax_85.syntax_pattern: set name of sidebar of %player% to %string%

en:
Change the sidebar name by:
* Scoreboard
* Name
* Players

This will change the name of a player's sidebar. The sidebar of the player must have at least one score in order for it to show on the sidebar.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_86.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_86.title: Set Sidebar Score
syntax_86.description:
Set score of a sidebar by:
* Scoreboard
* Name
* Value
* Player

This will change the score of a score in a player's sidebar or create a new score if it does not exist.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).
syntax_86.syntax_pattern: set score %string% in sidebar of %player% to %number%

en:
Set score of a sidebar by:
* Scoreboard
* Name
* Value
* Player

This will change the score of a score in a player's sidebar or create a new score if it does not exist.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_53.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_53.title: Delete Sidebar Score
syntax_53.description:
Delete a sidebar score by:
* Name
* Player

This will delete a specified score from a specified player.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

en:
Delete a sidebar score by:
* Name
* Player

This will delete a specified score from a specified player.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_125.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_125.title: Group Score Value
syntax_125.description:
These expressions will get either the name or value of a group based score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).
syntax_125.syntax_pattern:
group score (name|title) (of|from) id %string%
group score (value|number) (of|from) id %string%

en:
These expressions will get either the name or value of a group based score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_48.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_48.title: Delete Group Score
syntax_48.description:
Deletes a group score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

en:
Deletes a group score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_56.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_56.title: Edit ID based score
syntax_56.description:
Edit an ID based score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

en:
Edit an ID based score.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_42.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_42.title: Create Group Based Score
syntax_42.description:
Create a group ID based score and assign it to a player or multiple players.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).
syntax_42.syntax_pattern: (set|create) group id [based] score %string% in sidebar for %player% to %number% with id %string%

en:
Create a group ID based score and assign it to a player or multiple players.

For more details on how to use the skRayFall Scoreboard/Sidebar system, a tutorial can be found [here](https://skripthub.net/tutorials/19).

syntax_106.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_106.title: On Crafting Click
syntax_106.description:
Called when:
* 1st slot of player crafting inventory is clicked
* 2nd slot of player crafting inventory is clicked
* 3rd slot of player crafting inventory is clicked
* 4th slot of player crafting inventory is clicked
* Result slot of player crafting inventory is clicked

This is called when a player clicks a slot in the players inventory crafting slot. 0 = Top left, 1 = Top Right, 2 = Bottom left, 3 = Bottom right, 4 = result slot

en:
Called when:
* 1st slot of player crafting inventory is clicked
* 2nd slot of player crafting inventory is clicked
* 3rd slot of player crafting inventory is clicked
* 4th slot of player crafting inventory is clicked
* Result slot of player crafting inventory is clicked

This is called when a player clicks a slot in the players inventory crafting slot. 0 = Top left, 1 = Top Right, 2 = Bottom left, 3 = Bottom right, 4 = result slot

syntax_45.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_45.title: Create Particles
syntax_45.description:
This has been deprecated, please use Skript's built in particle system.

skRayFall's new particle system powered by EffectLib. Color's and ItemStacks can only be assigned to certain EffectLibParticle types. Please see [this](https://gist.github.com/eyesniper2/07f5c0955af05c0782ad) list for the details of which effects are supported.
syntax_45.syntax_pattern:
(create|display|show) %number% [of] %EffectLibParticle% particle[s] at %location% [(with data of %itemstack%|with color %number%, %number%(,| and) %number%)] [offset by %number%, %number%(,| and) %number%] [(with|at) speed %number%]
(create|display|show) %number% [of] %EffectLibParticle% particle[s] at %location% for %player% [with data of %itemstack%] [offset by %number%, %number%(,| and) %number%] [(with|at) speed %number%]

en:
This has been deprecated, please use Skript's built in particle system.

skRayFall's new particle system powered by EffectLib. Color's and ItemStacks can only be assigned to certain EffectLibParticle types. Please see [this](https://gist.github.com/eyesniper2/07f5c0955af05c0782ad) list for the details of which effects are supported.

syntax_61.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_61.title: Line Effect
syntax_61.syntax_pattern: (spawn|create|apply) (a|the|an) line (effect|formation) from %entity/location% to %entity/location% with id %string% [with particle[s] %particles%]

en: Creates a EffectLib line effect.
Creates an EffectLib wave effect.
Creates an EffectLib circle effect.

syntax_93.creator: eyesniper2
syntax_93.title: Tornado Effect
syntax_93.syntax_pattern: (spawn|create|apply) (a|the|an) tornado (effect|formation) at %entity/location% with id %string% [with tornado particle[s] %particles% and cloud particle[s] %particles%] [(set|and) radius %number%] [(set|and) max height %number%]

en: Creates an EffectLib tornado effect.
